is_valid.description: True if the document is a job description/posting, false otherwise

rejection_reason.description: If is_valid is false, explain why (e.g. 'document is a resume', 'document is an invoice')

title.description: The job posting title exactly as it appears in the document

required_skills.description: Skills explicitly listed as required or mandatory

desired_skills.description: Skills listed as preferred, desired, or nice-to-have

required_clearance.description: Required security clearance level, or null if none specified

min_experience_years.description: Minimum years of experience required, or null if not specified

industry_category.description: The industry or organizational function this role belongs to

job_title.description: Normalized standard job title for matching (e.g. 'Data Analyst' not 'Data & Excel Analyst II')

salary_range.description: Annual salary range in USD, or null values if not specified

description_summary.description: Concise summary of the role's responsibilities, team, and mission for matching purposes

responsibilities.description: 3-8 concise statements of what the role actually requires the person to DO (day-to-day duties, scope, mission). Highest-signal field for candidate matching — a résumé's experience is matched against these.

seniority.description: Seniority level (e.g. Junior, Mid, Senior, Lead, Principal, Manager, Director, Executive), or null if unclear.

domain.description: Primary mission/domain of the role (e.g. Signals Intelligence, Cybersecurity Operations, Systems Engineering, Financial Audit), or null if unclear.
